vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle has a DSG dual-clutch transmission — it requires 12V power to shift reliably.
Locate the shift lock slot — Cap near selector base on console.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot.
Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.

DSG REQUIRES POWER: Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If mechanical slot is used without power: DSG transmissions may resist — apply steady firm pressure and hold for several seconds.
vehicles.notes: Manual: clutch to N. DSG — restore power first.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air, or flatbed. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION OPTION: If equipped with manual trans, no shift lock — depress clutch and select Neutral. No override slot needed.

battery.location: Under hood or under rear seat — varies by generation
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle has a DSG dual-clutch transmission — it requires 12V power to shift reliably.
Locate the shift lock slot — Cap near selector base on console.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot.
Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.

DSG REQUIRES POWER: Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If mechanical slot is used without power: DSG transmissions may resist — apply steady firm pressure and hold for several seconds.
vehicles.notes: Manual: clutch to N. DSG: restore power first. Golf R AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD/GTI: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) on ground. Golf R 4MOTION AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION OPTION: If equipped with manual trans, no shift lock — depress clutch and select Neutral. No override slot needed.

knownIssues.title: Golf R AWD Cannot Be Disabled — Flatbed Only
knownIssues.detail: The Golf R 4MOTION AWD system cannot be disabled. Golf R must always be flatbedded. Standard Golf and GTI are FWD and can be wheel-lifted normally from the rear.

knownIssues.title: DSG Requires Power to Shift — Battery Often Under Rear Seat
knownIssues.detail: DSG dual-clutch transmission requires 12V power to shift to neutral. Battery is often under the rear seat on Golf variants — not always under the hood. Locate battery before attempting to jump.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals — NOT rear seat battery directly. AGM jump pack. Golf R: flatbed only (4MOTION AWD).

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — slot near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: Electronic selector — slot near selector base on console.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

shift: Turn ignition to ON.

Locate the shift lock slot — Cap near selector base.

Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.

DSG REQUIRES POWER: Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack.

If mechanical slot is used without power: DSG transmissions may resist — apply steady firm pressure and hold for several seconds.

battery.location: Under hood or under rear seat
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — slot near selector base
shift: Turn the Volkswagen ID.4 / ID.Buzz to ON/Ready mode.
Shift lock slot: Electronic selector — slot near selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding the slot.
Move selector to N.
FLATBED ONLY — do not tow with driven wheels on the ground.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood (12V auxiliary). 12V AUXILIARY BATTERY ONLY — never touch the high-voltage battery pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE: FLATBED ONLY — never tow with any driven wheels on the ground. Regenerative braking system can damage motor/inverter.
If vehicle must be moved short distance without flatbed, use dollies under ALL driven wheels.
12V battery ONLY for jumping — NEVER touch or access the high-voltage (HV) system. HV components are marked with ORANGE cables/covers.

knownIssues.title: FLATBED ONLY — Electric Drivetrain
knownIssues.detail: Electric RWD or AWD. Towing with wheels on ground will damage motors. Flatbed only with no exceptions.

knownIssues.title: 12V Battery Under Hood
knownIssues.detail: Unlike some EVs, the ID.4 and ID.Buzz 12V auxiliary battery is located under the conventional hood area. Standard jump procedure applies.

battery.warnings: NEVER touch HV battery. Flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Small cap or slot near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
AUTOMATIC: Locate shift lock slot — small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off cap. Insert key and press firmly.
While holding, press brake. Move selector to Neutral.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch fully and move gear lever to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Manual trans: depress clutch, Neutral. Mk3 generation.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key or flathead into slot and press firmly.
While holding, press brake. Move to Neutral.
DSG: requires 12V power — connect jump pack first.
MANUAL: depress clutch, move to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the REAR SEAT on Mk4 — NOT under the hood.
Use hood jump terminals: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−). Use these, not the rear seat battery directly.
Use AGM-compatible jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift normally.
FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
vehicles.notes: Battery under rear seat — use hood jump terminals. DSG: requires power.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: Battery under rear seat — use hood terminals.
FWD: lift from front.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Always use hood terminals — never jump directly at rear seat battery. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DSG: must restore 12V power before shifting — strongly preferred.
Once powered, press brake and shift to Neutral.
Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral.
vehicles.notes: New Beetle (1998-2010), Beetle A5 (2012-2019). DSG: power required. Manual: depress clutch.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front. DSG: restore power before shifting.

battery.warnings: DSG: must restore power before shifting.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console; DSG: slot on selector housing
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
DSG: REQUIRES 12V power — restore battery first.
Locate the shift lock slot near selector base or on selector housing.
Insert key or thin flathead, press firmly, hold, press brake, move to Neutral.
DSG without power will not release — always jump first.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DSG: must restore 12V power before shifting.
Once powered, shift to Neutral.
4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.notes: DSG: power required. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: DSG: restore power before shifting. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.
4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
DSG: cannot shift without 12V power — jump battery first.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. DSG: must restore power before shifting.

vehicles.drivetrain: 4WD (4MOTION, permanent AWD with low range TC)
vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral.
Transfer case must be in high range before road towing.
PHEV models: 12V auxiliary ONLY — never touch HV battery.
vehicles.notes: Permanent 4MOTION AWD with electronic TC. Must be in high range for road towing. PHEV (eHybrid) available on 3G — 12V only for jumping.
vehicles.warn: Permanent AWD — flatbed preferred. TC must be in high range. PHEV: 12V auxiliary ONLY.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED PREFERRED — permanent AWD. Wheel-lift with dollies if no flatbed.

tc.type: Electronic rotary dial or button on center console
positions: High range — standard road mode — use for road towing
Low range — off-road only — NEVER tow on road in low range
steps: Confirm TC is in high range (not low range) before road towing.
If wheel-lift: dollies REQUIRED on free-rolling axle.
PHEV: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.

towNotes: Permanent AWD — flatbed is safest.
TC must be in high range for road towing.
PHEV: 12V auxiliary only — never access HV battery.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. PHEV: 12V auxiliary only. Permanent AWD — flatbed preferred.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Chrysler Town & Country / Grand Caravan rebadge. Same as Chrysler procedure.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.

vehicles.trans: 4-speed auto (01M, Mk4) or 6-speed DSG (Mk5) or 5/6-speed manual
vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DSG (Mk5): must restore 12V power before shifting.
Once powered, shift to Neutral.
Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral.
vehicles.notes: DSG (Mk5+): power required. Manual: depress clutch. 4MOTION AWD (Golf 4Motion): flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: DSG: restore power before shifting. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front. 4MOTION AWD: flatbed preferred.

battery.warnings: DSG: must restore power before shifting.
